feature.name: Container Timing
feature.creator: jwilliams720@bloomberg.net
feature.summary: The Container Timing API enables monitoring when annotated sections of the DOM are displayed on screen and have finished their initial paint. A developer will have the ability to mark subsections of the DOM with the containertiming attribute (similar to elementtiming for the Element Timing API) and receive performance entries when that section has been painted for the first time. This API will allow developers to measure the timing of various components in their pages.

A developer will have the ability to mark subsections of the DOM with the containertiming attribute (similar to elementtiming for the Element Timing API) and receive performance entries when that section has been painted for the first time. This API will allow developers to measure the timing of various components in their pages. Category: Performance. Blink component: Blink>PerformanceAPIs. Stars: 90.

adoption.finding: The legacy HTML/JS counter 'ContainerTimingObserverRegistered' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 5744) measured 0.2148% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2025-12-24 with 196 data points. Mapping confidence: exact.
